completedItems: Parent, teacher, and director feedback detail flows are active and no longer disabled placeholders.
Feedback detail aggregates child, parent, teacher, messages, replies, attachments, and audit-derived status history.
Feedback status supports open, in-progress, resolved, and archived with persisted staff updates.
Parent message attachments, parent feedback attachments, and teacher reply attachments save through E01 attachments API/service.
Image attachments show thumbnails and preview/save actions.
Audio attachments support MediaRecorder when available and audio file fallback when unavailable.
Saved audio attachments render playable audio controls.
Attachment detail and content routes run server-side scope checks.
Attachment service enforces 5MB single-file and 3-per-related-object limits.
Storybook relatedType metadata and scope foundation is present.
E04 Playwright loop passed across parent, teacher, director, and cross-class forbidden access.
remainingItems: Real external object storage is not connected in E04.
ASR/OCR transcription is deferred to E05.
Voice assistant features are deferred to E06-E09.
Full storybook media export/share packaging is outside E04.
Full feature:smoke still has D08/non-E04 failures.
fixedFindings: Parent feedback/message attachment placeholders are replaced with working attachment selection and preview.
Director weekly/dashboard feedback detail entry is no longer disabled and opens a real detail flow.
Feedback status updates persist and reopen with status history.
Attachment content URLs are scoped on the server, not only hidden in the UI.
File input handling now copies FileList before clearing the input so selected files actually preview.

checks.featureSmoke: partial: FEATURE_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 FEATURE_SKIP_WEBSERVER=1 npm run feature:smoke ran; E04 passed, full suite failed 5 D08/non-E04 cases and left 1 test unrun

risks: metadata_only demo mode stores data URLs in the snapshot for local preview/playback; this is not production object storage.
Feedback detail message aggregation is child-scoped because older messages do not have a feedbackId relation.
MediaRecorder behavior depends on browser support; audio file upload fallback is provided.
Full feature smoke remains red due D08/non-E04 tests unrelated to the E04 targeted pass.
notes: E04 reused E01 API client, AppDataService, unified error envelope, and lib/server/scope.ts helpers. IMPLEMENTATION_STATUS.md was not modified.
